ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* The year the film was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the film */,
  "rating_tomatometer" INTEGER /* Tomatometer rating of the film */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the film has received */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description or synopsis of the film */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the film's director */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Main cast members of the film */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company of the film */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "run_time" INTEGER /* Run time of the film in minutes */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the film */,
  "box_office" INTEGER /* Box office earnings of the film */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Film rating (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "trailer_views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the film's trailer */,
  "poster_views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the film's poster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "parent_genre" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the review */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reviewer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media item */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film associated with the media */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., trailer, poster) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL to the media file */,
  "media_title" TEXT /* Title of the media */,
  "media_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the media */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the media was uploaded */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views on the media */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_media_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the film or review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the film or review was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the film */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings submitted */,
  "rating_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ratings (e.g., number of 1-star, 2-star, etc. ratings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award received */,
  "year_won" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Picture, Best Director) */,
  "award_ceremony" TEXT /* Name of the award ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_critics" (
  "critic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each critic */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the critic */,
  "publication" TEXT /* Publication the critic writes for */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the critic */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio of the critic */,
  "social_media_link" TEXT /* URL of the critic's social media profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("critic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "critic_reviews" (
  "critic_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each critic review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film being reviewed */,
  "critic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the critic who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the critic review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the critic */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the critic review helpful */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the critic review */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the critic review is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("critic_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_critic_reviews_critic_id FOREIGN KEY ("critic_id") REFERENCES film_critics ("critic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_critic_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film marked as a favorite or added to watchlist */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the preference was added */,
  "is_favorite" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film is marked as a favorite */,
  "watchlist" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film is in the user's watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
